subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Forgiver! Grant wings and pinions unto these broken-winged birds, and cause them to soar in the heights of pardon and forgiveness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا آمرزگارا این مرغان شکسته پرند بال و پری ببخش و در اوج عفو و غفران
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
